commit.message:
Address portion of PR comments

1. Add a new positive and negative test.  When peeling is enabled, the
   test checks whether the number of counted loops match our
   expectations both before as well as after peeling.  When peeling is
   disabled, the test ensures that the loop peeling compilation phases
   are absent from the IR.

2. Updated `(safepoint != nullptr || !loop->_has_call) && !LoopPeeling`
   to say `!LoopPeeling && (safepoint != nullptr || !loop->_has_call)`
   to make use of short-circuiting.

3. Added a new run to TestLoopPeeling.java to check the correctness of
   the execution in the presence of `-Xbatch`.

4. Restored unnecessary initialization of `safepoint`, since the branch
   condition that follows initializes this variable along both its
   paths.
